subject: fix(review): address 14 code review findings across UI, services, and hooks
body:
Fixes bugs, race conditions, accessibility gaps, and error handling issues
found during a comprehensive code review sweep.

Critical/High fixes:
- Atomic bulk arc delete via new bulkDeleteArcs() in graphService
- Combined useSelection state into single object to prevent desync
- Ref guard on smart matching to prevent double-click race condition
- Moved nested interactive control outside button in QueryBuilder
- Promise dedup for embeddingService init to prevent handler overwrite
- Local variable capture in usePWAInstall to prevent null dereference

Error handling:
- Toast notification for skipped arcs in GraphCanvas (was silent)
- Toast notification for algorithm failures in AnalysisPanel (was silent)
- Warning for unresolvable arc endpoints in merge review
- try/finally in downloadFile for URL.revokeObjectURL cleanup

Accessibility:
- aria-label on connection target buttons in DetailPanel
- ARIA group role and aria-current on tutorial progress dots

UX:
- Unambiguous date format in WorkspaceManager (month name)
- Renamed misleading "Review Items" button to "Next" in ImportModal
- Stable key prop on property edit rows in DetailPanel

Tags: review, bugs, accessibility, error-handling, race-conditions
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-sweep
Semver: patch
